creator: oleg.nauman@gmail.com
text:
Hello ,

I am observing the same issue ( Authentication with ... timed out ) with my rtw88 on current from today ( amd64 main-n274134-e02029e6f487 (

pciconf output:

rtw880@pci0:2:0:0:      class=0x028000 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x10ec device=0xc821 subvendor=0x1a3b subdevice=0x3040
    vendor     = 'Realtek Semiconductor Co., Ltd.'
    device     = 'RTL8821CE 802.11ac PCIe Wireless Network Adapter'
    class      = network

System boot messages:

rtw880: <rtw_8821ce> port 0xd000-0xd0ff mem 0xef100000-0xef10ffff irq 17 at device 0.0 on pci2
rtw880: successfully loaded firmware image 'rtw88/rtw8821c_fw.bin'
rtw880: Firmware version 24.11.0, H2C version 12
wlan2: Ethernet address: 80:91:33:4b:4a:d1

wpa_supplicant[350]: wlan2: Removed BSSID a8:5e:45:47:0d:b8 from ignore list (clear)
wpa_supplicant[350]: wlan2: Trying to associate with a8:5e:45:47:0d:b8 (SSID='****' freq=2452 MHz)
wpa_supplicant[350]: wlan2: Authentication with a8:5e:45:47:0d:b8 timed out.
wpa_supplicant[350]: wlan2: Added BSSID a8:5e:45:47:0d:b8 into ignore list, ignoring for 10 seconds
wpa_supplicant[350]: wlan2: CTRL-EVENT-DISCONNECTED bssid=a8:5e:45:47:0d:b8 reason=3 locally_generated=1
wpa_supplicant[350]: wlan2: BSSID a8:5e:45:47:0d:b8 ignore list count incremented to 2, ignoring for 10 seconds
wpa_supplicant[350]: wlan2: CTRL-EVENT-DSCP-POLICY clear_all


ifconfig -v wlan2 list scan output:

SSID/MESH ID                      BSSID              CHAN RATE    S:N     INT CAPS
****                          a8:5e:45:47:0d:b8    9   54M  -53:-96   100 EP   SSID<****> RATES<B2,B4,B11,B22,36,48,72,108> DSPARMS<9> TIM<050400030000> ERP<0x4> XRATES<12,18,24,96> RSN<v1 mc:AES-CCMP uc:AES-CCMP km:8021X-PSK, caps 0x8c> UNKNOWN_ELEMID_66<420200-> HTCAP<cap 0x19fe param 0x1b mcsset[0-15,32] extcap 0x0 txbf 0x0 antenna 0x0> HTINFO<ctl 9, d,16,0,0 basicmcs[]> OVERLAP_BSS<4a0e14000a002c01c8-> EXTCAP<7f080500000000000040> WPS<v:1.0 state:C vendor:00372a00012005022688> VEN<dd090010180201008c0000> WME<qosinfo 0x84 BE[aifsn 3 cwmin 4 cwmax 10 txop 0] BK[aifsn 7 cwmin 4 cwmax 10 txop 0] VO[aifsn 2 cwmin 3 cwmax 4 txop 94] VI[aifsn 2 cwmin 2 cwmax 3 txop 47]>


Access point is the ASUS RT-AC1200G+ router

ath(4), run(4), rtwn(4), wifibox as well few dozens of various Android based devices associate with this router without any issues.
I have tried also some Huawei OEM LTE modem with wifi support and some Lenovo tablet as access points with the same result : all devices associate with exception of my rtw88
